reportingCurrencyWizard.title: Change currency and review accounts
reportingCurrencyWizard.previewUnavailable: We couldn’t load your accounts for review. Please try again.
reportingCurrencyWizard.stepOneInfoBody:
{{currency}} will become your reporting currency for dashboard totals, reports, and new accounts.

On the next step, you will review each existing account and choose whether to convert it to {{code}}, keep its current currency, or correct a previously selected wrong currency.

Nothing will change until you review and confirm everything.
reportingCurrencyWizard.stepOneMessagePrimary: Smart Pocket will use {{currency}} for dashboard totals, reports, and as the default currency for new accounts.
reportingCurrencyWizard.stepOneMessageSecondary: Your existing accounts will not change until you review and confirm how each one should be handled.
reportingCurrencyWizard.noAccounts: No active personal accounts need review.
reportingCurrencyWizard.emptyAccountNotice: This account is empty. Its currency can be changed directly without conversion or archiving.
reportingCurrencyWizard.correctionCheckbox: I confirm that all eligible amounts in this account were originally entered in {{currency}}.
reportingCurrencyWizard.successToast: Reporting currency changed to {{currency}} and your account choices were applied successfully.

options.convertDescription: Use today's rate. The current account will be archived and a new version in {{currency}} will become active.
options.convertEmptyDescription: This account is empty. Its currency can be changed directly without conversion or archiving.
options.correctDescription: No exchange rate will be applied. The numbers will stay the same, but the currency will change.

subscription.title: Subscription & Billing

help.title: Help & Support
help.description: Find quick guidance, support channels, and answers to the most common Smart Pocket questions.
help.faqDescription: Helpful answers for onboarding, data entry, security, and reporting.

1.question: How do I add a transaction?
1.answer: Go to Transactions and choose Add Transaction, or use the plus button in the bottom navigation.

2.question: How do I set up a budget?
2.answer: Open Budgets, choose Add Budget, select a category, set an amount, and choose your alert threshold.

3.question: Can I import bank transactions?
3.answer: CSV import is planned for a future release. For now, enter transactions manually.

4.question: How do I change my currency?
4.answer: Go to Settings, open Preferences, and select your default currency.

5.question: Is my data secure?
5.answer: Yes. Your data is protected with encryption, private account isolation, and secure access controls so only you can access it.

6.question: How do I switch to Arabic (RTL)?
6.answer: Use the language switcher in the top bar and choose Arabic. The layout switches to right-to-left automatically.

help.faqCtaDescription: Browse the Smart Pocket FAQ library for setup help, workflow guidance, and support answers.

semimonthly.description: Paid on two fixed dates, usually 24 times per year

monthly.title: Monthly payday rule

paySchedule.irregularNote: Smart Pocket uses monthly planning by default for irregular income.

validation.customAnchorDate: Custom schedules need an anchor date.
validation.customCycleDays: Custom schedules must repeat every {{min}}-{{max}} days.
validation.semimonthlyDay1Range: Semimonthly day 1 must be 1-31 or the last day of the month.
validation.semimonthlyDay2Range: Semimonthly day 2 must be 1-31 or the last day of the month.
validation.semimonthlyDifferentDays: Twice-a-month schedules need two different payday positions.
validation.semimonthlyDayOrder: The second semimonthly payday must be later in the month than the first.
validation.monthlyRuleRequired: Choose how monthly payday should be calculated.
validation.monthlyDayRange: Specific monthly payday must be a day from 1 to 31.
validation.irregularDashboardPeriod: Irregular income uses current month as the dashboard default.
